channel.title: Drugs N Stuff
channel.description: PED education with Dave Crosland and Scott McNally. A pull no punches, honest look inside the world of performance enhancing drugs.
channel.author: Think BIG Bodybuilding Media
channel.itunes:author: Think BIG Bodybuilding Media
